generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded actuator within Building Control Systems (BCS) for dynamic lighting control, modeled within BIM environment to enable bidirectional communication with the Digital Twin. Extracts device metadata (tenant ID, endpoint addresses) from BIM for real-time operation."
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated HVAC device controller integrated with the Digital Twin for real-time climate regulation. Configured via BIM-extracted metadata including operational parameters and communication endpoints."
]

instance OccupantComfortActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "System actuator for automated occupant comfort adjustments (thermal, humidity, lighting) with bidirectional communication enabled through BIM-integrated middleware."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental IoT sensor deployed across building infrastructure to capture real-time temperature data. Semantically linked to BIM elements for contextual data alignment with virtual representation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental IoT sensor measuring real-time humidity levels integrated with the Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono middleware. Data synchronized with BIM spatial elements for operational context."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor capturing real-time light level measurements for adaptive lighting optimization. Data stream processed through Ditto for bidirectional communication with virtual twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Presence detection sensor providing real-time occupancy data for space utilization analytics. Integrated with BIM elements to maintain contextual alignment between physical and virtual representations."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BuildingInformationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Foundational BIM model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data of building components serving as the semantic backbone for the Digital Twin. Automatically enriched with runtime semantics via Model-Driven Engineering transformations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler, UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance RuntimeSemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Automatically generated model containing device metadata, control logic, and operational configurations extracted from BIM via MDE methodologies. Serves as the runtime interface between physical systems and the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance SensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time data stream ingested via Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware containing processed sensor measurements synchronized with BIM elements. Enables bidirectional communication between physical and virtual representations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoEnabler, UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D visualization model rendered in Unreal Engine 5 providing immersive monitoring and interactive simulation capabilities. Synchronized with runtime data streams for real-time operational visualization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware enabling real-time data exchange and bidirectional communication between physical IoT sensors and the Digital Twin. Acts as the primary data ingestion layer for sensor streams."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, AdaptiveLightingControlService
]

instance DittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto platform facilitating bidirectional communication and device twin management for building automation systems. Handles runtime device metadata and control logic synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, OccupantComfortAnalyticsService, AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing immersive 3D visualization and interactive monitoring capabilities for the Digital Twin. Renders real-time operational data in a virtual environment."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService, OccupantComfortAnalyticsService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework automating the extraction of domain semantics from BIM models and generating runtime interfaces. Reduces manual effort in Digital Twin deployment and enhances maintainability."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing continuous real-time monitoring of building operational parameters through synchronized sensor data streams and visualization components."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingOperationalStatusInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service analyzing historical and real-time data to forecast equipment failures and operational inefficiencies in building systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAlertInsight, EnergyOptimizationRecommendationInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D interactive visualization service rendering real-time building operations in Unreal Engine 5 environment for immersive monitoring and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupantComfortVisualizationInsight, SystemPerformanceBenchmarkingInsight
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning-based service optimizing lighting schedules based on real-time occupancy and light level data for energy efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationAction
]

instance OccupantComfortAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing real-time sensor data to provide occupant comfort analytics and automated adjustments to environmental parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides ThermalComfortInsight, HumidityOptimizationAction
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Middleware service automating the commissioning of building systems by integrating BIM configurations with runtime device twins."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemCommissioningAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingOperationalStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insight providing current operational status of all building systems including HVAC, lighting, and occupancy data."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert system predicting potential failures in HVAC components and other building systems based on sensor data analysis."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendations for energy optimization including adaptive lighting schedules and HVAC adjustments based on occupancy patterns."
]

instance LightingOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated action adjusting lighting levels based on real-time occupancy and natural light conditions to optimize energy consumption."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThermalComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time thermal comfort analysis providing insights into occupant comfort levels based on temperature and humidity data."
]

instance HumidityOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of humidity levels to maintain optimal comfort conditions based on occupancy patterns."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemCommissioningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated configuration and testing of building systems using BIM-integrated middleware to ensure proper operation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OccupantComfortVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of occupant comfort metrics including thermal, humidity, and lighting conditions within the building environment."
]

instance SystemPerformanceBenchmarkingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison between as-designed building performance metrics from BIM and as-operated performance data from real-time monitoring."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure environment containing all building systems and components being modeled as a Digital Twin."
    base:contains LightingSystemActuator, HVACController, OccupantComfortActuator,
                 TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, LightLevelSensor, OccupancySensor,
                 BuildingInformationModel, RuntimeSemanticModel
]

instance BuildingInfrastructureSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure environment containing all building systems and components being modeled as a Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is achieved via **control signals** generated by the DT and transmitted back to physical actuators through the same middleware infrastructure (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). The framework supports **bidirectional communication**, allowing the DT to send commands (e.g., adjust lighting levels, HVAC setpoints) to physical systems based on real-time analytics or user inputs. This interaction is enabled by **runtime artifacts** automatically generated from the BIM model, which define the control logic and device configurations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time**, with synchronization occurring at **millisecond to second intervals** depending on sensor data frequency and middleware latency. The framework supports **low-latency data processing** for critical control applications (e.g., lighting adjustments) and **periodic updates** for non-critical analytics (e.g., energy consumption trends). The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of synchronization between the PT and DT over time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with a **centralized DT framework** integrating:
   - **BIM models** as the semantic backbone.
   - **Middleware layers** (Hono/Ditto) for real-time data exchange.
   - **Visualization layer** (Unreal Engine) for user interaction.
   - **Extensible service modules** (e.g., control logic, analytics) connected via standardized interfaces. The framework enables **modular deployment** of DT components, allowing incremental scaling and integration of new services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **all life-cycle stages** of the building: **design** (BIM modeling), **construction** (device integration), **operation** (real-time monitoring), and **refurbishment** (adaptive updates). The framework supports **dynamic evolution** of the DT by embedding **runtime semantics** (e.g., sensor configurations, control logic) into the BIM model, ensuring alignment with the **as-built** and **as-operated** states of the physical asset. The **BOREALIS project** exemplifies this by using post-occupancy sensor data to iteratively refine control policies."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies the **alignment between virtual and physical representations**.
   - **Model validation** during deployment to ensure **semantic consistency** with BIM and runtime data.
   - **Real-time synchronization** via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** to minimize **data latency and drift**.
   The framework addresses **semantic drift** (as referenced in related work) through **iterative refinement of control policies** using **post-occupancy data**. However, **uncertainty quantification** (e.g., statistical analysis) is not explicitly implemented in the described system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on **Eclipse Hono** (for device connectivity) and **Ditto** (for state management) using **MQTT-based protocols** for real-time communication. The middleware integrates with **BIM models** via standardized metadata schemas (e.g., tenant IDs, device endpoints) to enable **bidirectional data flow**. Network protocols are optimized for **low-latency** interactions, critical for control applications (e.g., lighting adjustments)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **middleware-centric framework**, hosted via **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** (likely in a **cloud-native or hybrid architecture**) to support **scalable, distributed operations**. The framework does not specify dedicated rendering servers but leverages **Unreal Engine’s cloud capabilities** for visualization. Deployment involves:
   - **Automated artifact generation**: MDE transforms BIM models into **deployable configurations** for Hono/Ditto.
   - **Modular service deployment**: Custom services are integrated via **standardized extension points**.
   - **Lifecycle-aware hosting**: Ensures **low-overhead updates** and **scalability** across building infrastructures."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** through:
   - **Standardized extension points**: Enable **plug-and-play integration** of **third-party services** (e.g., ERP, CMMS) via **modular APIs**.
   - **Interoperability frameworks**: Compliance with **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM) and **middleware protocols** (e.g., Hono/Ditto).
   - **Data normalization**: Ensures **semantic consistency** across **heterogeneous systems** (e.g., BIM, IoT, visualization tools).
   The framework emphasizes **scalable, interoperable architectures** to facilitate **cross-system collaboration**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **standardized integration frameworks** (e.g., **Eclipse Ditto/Hono protocols**) and **BIM-based semantic alignment** to ensure interoperability. While specific **industry standards** (e.g., IFC, COBie) are not explicitly referenced, the system leverages **BIM’s role as the semantic foundation** and **modular service architectures** to comply with **AECO domain conventions**. The **standardized extension points** enable compliance with **future standardization efforts** in DT deployment."
]
